programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Landlords get a shock when their next-door tenant moves out; a stolen school bus in Brooklyn, N.Y., smashes up the block as the driver tries to escape from the cops; a Halloween prank in Cincinnati requires a neighbor's help to deflate the problem.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A pedestrian in Chicago loses her cool when one of her neighbors bicycles on the sidewalk; in South Carolina, a man challenges a neighbor for using a handicapped parking spot when she doesn't look handicapped.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In a California suburb, a man gets angry over a political flag in his neighbor's front yard; a Minneapolis landlord is shocked to discover what his tenants have been hoarding.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two neighbors feud over access to a boat ramp; in an incredible act of bravery, a man pulls an elderly neighbor out of a raging house fire; an armed face-off between neighbors in Texas has tragic consequences.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Florida man takes exception to his neighbor setting off July Fourth fireworks; a couple from Boise, Idaho, catch their neighbor throwing cat litter over the fence.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman discovers a stranger looking in her window at night; a mother argues over the noise of her children's ATVs; a woman defends a street vendor selling cold drinks against a neighbor who wants the seller gone.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: After arguing with neighbors, a family awakes to discover their boat engulfed in flames; a couple is shocked when their security camera captures a naked neighbor; a man poking a street performer is surprised when the living cowboy statue retaliates.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Battling neighbors in San Antonio compare land surveys to determine whose yard owns an extra foot of land; a group of Florida college students are confronted by a man with a weapon; a Houston woman confronts her online critic.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Footage from cellphones, drones, home security cameras and more showcase the kindness and conflict between real-life neighbors throughout the United States.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders. When Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter. But what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?
